headline: Unpacking Q4 Earnings: Quanta (NYSE:PWR) In The Context Of Other Construction and Engineering Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at construction and engineering stocks, starting with Quanta (NYSE:PWR).

headline: EMCOR to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect From the Stock
summary: EMCOR heads into Q1 with EPS seen at $5.85 and revenue at $4.22B, as data center work and a large backlog help offset weather and cost pressures.
